title: Software CSP Co-Sell Specialist – Hyperscale AI and Developer Ecosystem
company_focus: GPU computing and AI hardware/software platforms
description:
NVIDIA is seeking a Software CSP Co-Sell Specialist to drive
strategic engagement and joint go-to-market execution with a
leading Cloud Service Provider (CSP). This role focuses on
accelerating adoption of NVIDIA AI and Generative AI
software by working across the CSP’s engineering, developer,
product, and field organizations. This position blends
technical partnership, ecosystem development, field
enablement, and co-sell strategy. You will work at the
intersection of engineering integration and revenue
acceleration—ensuring NVIDIA technologies are deeply
embedded within CSP services and that field teams are
enabled to scale GPU-accelerated AI workloads. The ideal
candidate combines strong knowledge of cloud AI
architectures with experience driving multi-functional
alignment across engineering, product, sales, and marketing
teams.

What You’ll Be Doing:

- Develop and complete a joint co-sell and ecosystem strategy
  with CSP collaborators, aligning engineering integrations
  to revenue priorities.
- Build strong relationships with CSP engineering leaders,
  architects, and developer communities to accelerate
  integration of NVIDIA AI and GPU-accelerated technologies.
- Identify and prioritize CSP services and applications that
  can benefit from GPU acceleration in AI, Generative AI,
  HPC, and advanced analytics workloads.
- Partner with CSP and NVIDIA enablement teams to develop and
  deliver technical workshops, demos, and solution content
  for both developer and field sales audiences.
- Translate developer and engineering feedback into actionable
  product insights and roadmap input for NVIDIA internal
  teams.
- Support strategic customer opportunities by providing
  technical guidance, architectural validation, and
  alignment between CSP and NVIDIA teams.
- Drive joint go-to-market initiatives that connect
  engineering integration with field execution and pipeline
  development.
- Collaborate with Solutions Architects, Product, Marketing,
  and Sales teams to ensure cohesive messaging and technical
  positioning.
- Represent NVIDIA at industry conferences, CSP developer
  events, and technical summits to strengthen ecosystem
  influence and showcase AI platform capabilities.
- Monitor competitive dynamics within the CSP ecosystem and
  communicate insights internally.

What We Need to See:

- 12+ years of experience in enterprise technology, cloud
  platforms, AI/ML, scalable applications, or GPU
  technologies.
- Strong understanding of AI infrastructure, Generative AI,
  machine learning, and cloud-native architectures on Azure.
- Experience working across engineering and field
  organizations to drive technology adoption.
- Proven ability to build strategic partnerships within a
  cloud ecosystem (Azure experience preferred).
- Excellent communication and presentation skills with both
  technical and business audiences.
- A Bachelors degree or equivalent experience is required; an
  advanced degree is preferred.

Ways to stand out from the crowd:

- Existing relationship with Microsoft sales and partnership
  organization.
- Familiarity with NVIDIA's product portfolio.
- Understanding of CSP partner ecosystem.

NVIDIA is widely considered to be one of the technology
world’s most desirable employers. We have some of the most
forward-thinking and dedicated people in the world working
for us. If you're creative and autonomous, we want to hear
from you!

Your cash compensation will be determined based on your
location, experience and the pay of employees in similar
positions with 85% paid through base salary and 15% variable
compensation. The cash compensation range is 224,000 USD -
356,500 USD for Level 5, and 248,000 USD - 396,750 USD for
Level 6.

You will also be eligible for equity and benefits.

Applications for this job will be accepted at least until
March 17, 2026.

This posting is for an existing vacancy.

NVIDIA uses AI tools in its recruiting processes.

NVIDIA is committed to fostering a diverse work environment
and proud to be an equal opportunity employer. As we highly
value diversity in our current and future employees, we do
not discriminate (including in our hiring and promotion
practices) on the basis of race, religion, color, national
origin, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, age,
marital status, veteran status, disability status or any
other characteristic protected by law.

Build relationships with CSP engineering leaders, architects, and developer communities to accelerate integration of NVIDIA AI and GPU technologies
Identify and prioritize CSP services and applications that can benefit from GPU acceleration for AI, Generative AI, HPC, and analytics workloads
Partner with enablement teams to develop and deliver technical workshops, demos, and solution content for developer and field sales audiences
Translate developer and engineering feedback into actionable product insights and roadmap input

use_cases: GPU-accelerated AI workloads in cloud environments
Generative AI services deployed through CSP platforms
High-performance computing (HPC) applications on cloud infrastructure
Advanced analytics workloads using GPU acceleration
Developer ecosystem enablement for AI/ML platforms
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a strategic partnership and go-to-market role
focused on ecosystem development and co-sell strategy with
cloud service providers. While it requires deep knowledge of
AI/ML and GPU technologies, the role involves driving
adoption and partnerships rather than building, training, or
deploying AI systems directly.
